description_long: This is a small, rounded cup with a smooth, matte blue exterior and a single, circular handle. The cup features a prominent decorative panel on one side, displaying a vivid blue flower with detailed white stamens, adding a touch of artistry to its otherwise minimalist design. The handle is ergonomically shaped, blending seamlessly into the cup's body for comfortable gripping. The rim is thick and gently curved, providing a soft edge for drinking. The interior appears to be the same blue color as the exterior, suggesting a uniform material throughout. The cup is likely made of ceramic or porcelain, suitable for holding hot or cold beverages in urban environments such as cafes, parks, or outdoor seating areas.
description: A small, matte blue cup with a rounded body, ergonomic handle, and a decorative blue flower panel on one side.
description_view_0: The back of the cup, showing the handle and a partial glimpse of the decorative flower panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth, matte blue surface and the circular handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side of the cup, showing a plain blue surface with no handle or decoration visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the decorative blue flower panel and the handle on the right side.
